product: 医保可信数据通行 Agent

legend.verified: Exercised end-to-end with saved runtime evidence
legend.partial: Implemented but with a stated scope cut
legend.cut: Intentionally out of build scope; not claimed in materials

claims.claim: A live LLM provider is on the critical path of the agent's planning step (not mocked).
claims.notes: Key discovered from ~/use_key.txt via scripts/apply_use_key_env.mjs -> .env.local; never shipped to client.

claims.claim: The agent changes durable state (release state transitions), it is not a read-only report.
evidence: .hunter/agent-runs.json (before_state -> after_state: 待发布 -> 隔离 and 待发布 -> 需审批)
docs/screenshots/02-result-quarantine.png (mutate 状态变更 待发布 -> 隔离)
claims.notes: Safety precedence: quarantine > approval > correction > releasable.

claims.claim: Decisions are executed by deterministic server-side tools, not by free-text LLM output.
evidence: src/lib/agent/tools.ts (pure validators: schema_mapper, code_dictionary_validator, tokenized_identity_matcher, access_policy_evaluator, anomaly_profiler)
docs/screenshots/03-replay.png (7 tool calls with explicit in/out)
claims.notes: LLM plans the order/focus; tools decide pass/fail and perform writes.

claims.claim: All state (releases, runs, issues, corrections, quarantine, approvals, replay) is persisted in a real database.
evidence: data/release-gate.db + release-gate.db-wal (~3MB WAL of real writes)

claims.claim: Every run produces a replayable, inspectable audit trail.
evidence: replay_timeline table populated per run (observe/plan/tools/mutate/verify events)

claims.claim: A human approval boundary exists for access-policy conflicts; the agent does not auto-release sensitive data.
evidence: smokeB -> result_state=需审批 with a pending release_approval row
src/lib/repo.ts decideApproval() (human decision writes a separate replay event)

claims.claim: When the provider is unreachable the agent recovers without claiming a false success.
evidence: .hunter/degraded-run.json (status=degraded, result_state=检查失败, no issues/tools emitted)
claims.notes: Captured by pointing OPENAI_BASE_URL at a dead host (127.0.0.1:9).

claims.claim: Different dirty inputs produce genuinely different agent decisions (no canned single path).
evidence: .hunter/live-provider-smoke.json assertions: different_output_hash, different_result_state, different_writer_tools all true
smokeA hash=abb6332e5cf13d6b (隔离) vs smokeB hash=566fd47a2d0430f2 (需审批)

claims.claim: All demo data is synthetic / desensitized; no real sensitive medical-insurance data is used.
evidence: UI footer label 合成脱敏数据 in docs/screenshots/01-release-gate.png

claims.claim: The product is usable on desktop and mobile.
The product compiles as a production build with passing type checks.
evidence: npm run build -> exit 0, 15 routes, types valid (.hunter/operations-check.json)

claims.claim: Connect to a real 可信数据空间 / production 医保 trusted data space.
evidence: pitch/project_prd.zh.md (migration path documented; fixtures preserve the same row/manifest/policy shape)
claims.notes: Out of hackathon build scope. Not claimed as done in any public material; framed as the expansion path only.
